# diameter v2.7.1-rc0 - Table of Contents

## Pages

- [Release Notes](notes.md)

- User's Guides
  - [Introduction](diameter_intro.md)
  - [Usage](diameter_using.md)
  - [Examples](diameter_examples.md)
  - [Standards Compliance](diameter_soc.md)

- Command Line Tools
  - [diameterc](diameterc_cmd.md)

- References
  - [diameter_dict](diameter_dict.md)

## Modules

- [diameter](diameter.md): Main API of the diameter application.
- [diameter_app](diameter_app.md): Callback module of a Diameter application.
- [diameter_codec](diameter_codec.md): Decode and encode of Diameter messages.
- [diameter_make](diameter_make.md): Diameter dictionary compilation.
- [diameter_sctp](diameter_sctp.md): Diameter transport over SCTP.
- [diameter_service](diameter_service.md)
- [diameter_tcp](diameter_tcp.md): Diameter transport over TCP.
- [diameter_transport](diameter_transport.md): Diameter transport interface.
